---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ashis2489
---

## 💡 Feature Summary
A brief, one-line description of the feature.

## 🎯 Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature solve? What's the current pain point?

> e.g. "Currently users have to X manually every time, which is tedious because..."

## 🚀 Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you think about? Why is your proposed solution better?

## 📸 Mockups / Examples
If applicable, add wireframes, sketches, or examples from other projects.

## 📝 Additional Context
Any other context, links, or references that help explain the request.

## ✅ Definition of Done
How will we know this feature is complete?
- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...
